sections.paragraph:
Ἀδδί, ὁ indecl. Addi in the genealogy of Jesus Lk 3:28 (Ἀδδει Tdf.; W-H., S., Vog.).

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

W-H. W-H. = BWestcott/FHort—List 1, beg.

Vog. Vog. = HVogels, editor of the Greek NT—List 1, beg.

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 18
